title: Machine Learning Engineer, YouTube Live Discovery
required_qualifications: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience.
8 years of experience with software development in one or more programming languages (e.g., Python, C, C++, Java, JavaScript).
3 years of experience in a technical leadership role.
preferred_qualifications: Master's degree or PhD in Computer Science or related technical field.
3 years of experience working in a complex, matrixed organization.
3 years of experience with ML classification systems, ranking and recommendation systems or similar.
Experience in computer vision/NLP/ML/data mining areas.
responsibilities: Work on improving ML algorithms and end-to-end solutions to empower live recommendations and to grow live ecosystems responsibly.
Set up growth metrics and goals, do the analysis and research to identify the growth areas and lead a team of engineers to iterate multiple experiments.
Communicate across multiple YouTube engineering teams and lead to align with the design direction and future plan of your projects.

Work closely with the YouTube discovery teams (Home/WatchNext/Notifications/Living Room/etc), Live infra and experience teams, collaborate closely with Google Deepmind teams, YouTube knowledge and YouTube (TnS) Trust and Safety.
education: Bachelor's degree or equivalent practical experience
